title: How a man of God handles betrayal
caption:
When the wound comes from inside the room, everything in you wants to react.

Don't.

The worst decisions a man makes come from the freshest pain. Give it 24 hours. Take it to God before you take it to the group chat. Name it to one man. Once. Then stop rehearsing it.

And when the time comes to forgive — you forgive because Christ forgave you when you were still in the wrong. Not because it doesn't still hurt. Not because they deserve it.

Forgiveness isn't the same as trust. You don't have to restore the position. But you release the debt.

That's what a man of God does.

Save this for the week you need it. Send it to a brother who does.

#faith #christianmen #forgiveness #godlymen #manofgod #realtalk #scripture #christianity
